name: Spa / Massage soundtrack
description: 60-90 minute low-energy soundtrack for massage, bodywork, or spa treatment. Single drifting arc, no peak, gradually softens toward the end.

phases.name: Settling
phases.notes: Client is arriving, settling onto the table.

phases.name: Drift
phases.notes: Steady, low-percussion. The body of the session.

phases.name: Soften
phases.notes: Slowing further. Therapist is wrapping up.

_status: stub — verify with a spa therapist before relying on it
